tweet: Creating a National Infrastructure Bank: This project would provide federal seed money to leverage significant private sector investment in major infrastructure projects that follow environmental guidelines.

name: Rep. Carolyn Bourdeaux
tweet: An initiative to Upcycle Abandoned Malls: As more and more shopping goes online, retail malls — and the large plots of land they sit on — are going unoccupied and unused, taking up valuable real estate. These areas can be redeveloped in a way that serves the community.

name: Rep. Carolyn Bourdeaux
tweet: The Building Up the Suburbs (BUS) Act: The BUS Act would fund a regional bus rapid transit system that would run along our major highways — or express lane transit — to help people get from suburban hubs to major commercial hubs while skipping the traffic.

name: Rep. Carolyn Bourdeaux
tweet: The National & Regional Greenways Act: This legislation would provide funding for major bike and pedestrian paths that link parks and community centers, supporting projects like the visionary Chattahoochee River Greenway.
